intent.description: Search Google Flights for itineraries between two airports with dates, trip type, and filters (stops, airlines, price, times, duration, bags).
intent.userSaid: searched for a round trip flight; searched for a one way flight; played with the stops and the airlines filters; added bags; played with the price and time filters; played with the duration filter; did a multi city flight query

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: Origin airport/city IATA code, e.g. SJC

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Destination airport/city IATA code, e.g. SAN

parameters.name: return_date
parameters.description: Return date in YYYY-MM-DD (omit/empty for one way)

parameters.name: airlines
parameters.description: Comma-separated alliance (ONEWORLD/SKYTEAM/STAR_ALLIANCE) or 2-letter carrier codes (e.g. AS,WN). Empty = no filter

parameters.name: max_price
parameters.description: Maximum total price in USD (0 = no filter)

parameters.name: outbound_times
parameters.description: Outbound departure window in hours, e.g. '6-23' (empty = no filter)

parameters.name: return_times
parameters.description: Return departure window in hours, e.g. '6-23' (empty = no filter)

parameters.name: max_duration
parameters.description: Maximum total trip duration in minutes, e.g. 540 (0 = no filter)

parameters.name: carry_on_bags
parameters.description: Number of carry-on bags to filter/price by (0 = no filter)
